name: diagnose-codex-desktop-lag
description: Diagnose Codex Desktop lag on Windows, macOS, and Linux and apply one confirmed, reversible repair at a time.

interface.shortDescription: Diagnose and safely repair Codex Desktop lag
interface.longDescription: Run isolated Node.js diagnostics for CPU, GPU, I/O, SQLite, logs, threads, rollouts, temporary files, workspaces, WSL, and display drivers before applying one confirmed and reversible repair.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Diagnose Codex Desktop Lag to run a complete read-only diagnosis before proposing one repair.
